title: A CPU-Centric Perspective on Agentic AI
summary_zh: 剖析五種代表性工作負載（Haystack RAG、Toolformer、ChemCrow、Langchain、SWE-Agent），揭示被忽略的瓶頸：CPU 上的工具處理可消耗高達 90.6% 的總延遲。提出 CGAM 和 MAWS，在 Intel Emerald Rapids + NVIDIA B200 上實現 2.1× P50 延遲降低。
summary_en: Profiles five representative workloads (Haystack RAG, Toolformer, ChemCrow, Langchain, SWE-Agent), revealing an overlooked bottleneck: CPU-side tool processing can consume up to 90.6% of total latency. Proposes CGAM and MAWS, achieving 2.1x P50 latency reduction on Intel Emerald Rapids + NVIDIA B200.
